action.proof_term:
intro n shifts factor H hH hlt hfactor hlarge
have hinj : Set.InjOn factor (shifts : Set ℕ) := by
  intro k₁ hk₁ k₂ hk₂ heq
  simp only [Finset.mem_coe] at hk₁ hk₂
  by_contra hkne
  rcases lt_or_gt_of_ne hkne with hk₁k₂ | hk₂k₁
  · have hk₂n : k₂ < n := hlt k₂ hk₂
    have hd₁ : factor k₁ ∣ n - k₁ := (hfactor k₁ hk₁).2.1
    have hd₂ : factor k₁ ∣ n - k₂ := by
      simpa [heq] using (hfactor k₂ hk₂).2.1
    have hgap : factor k₁ ∣ k₂ - k₁ := by
      have h := Nat.dvd_sub hd₁ hd₂
      have hgap_eq : (n - k₁) - (n - k₂) = k₂ - k₁ := by omega
      rwa [hgap_eq] at h
    have hgap_pos : 0 < k₂ - k₁ := by omega
    have hle := Nat.le_of_dvd hgap_pos hgap
    exact (not_lt_of_ge hle) (hlarge k₁ hk₁ k₂ hk₂ hk₁k₂)
  · have hk₁n : k₁ < n := hlt k₁ hk₁
    have hd₁ : factor k₂ ∣ n - k₂ := (hfactor k₂ hk₂).2.1
    have hd₂ : factor k₂ ∣ n - k₁ := by
      simpa [heq] using (hfactor k₁ hk₁).2.1
    have hgap : factor k₂ ∣ k₁ - k₂ := by
      have h := Nat.dvd_sub hd₁ hd₂
      have hgap_eq : (n - k₂) - (n - k₁) = k₁ - k₂ := by omega
      rwa [hgap_eq] at h
    have hgap_pos : 0 < k₁ - k₂ := by omega
    have hle := Nat.le_of_dvd hgap_pos hgap
    exact (not_lt_of_ge hle) (hlarge k₂ hk₂ k₁ hk₁ hk₂k₁)
let primes := shifts.image factor
have hcard : primes.card = shifts.card := by
  dsimp [primes]
  exact Finset.card_image_iff.mpr hinj
have hprime : ∀ p ∈ primes, p.Prime := by
  intro p hp
  dsimp [primes] at hp
  simp only [Finset.mem_image] at hp
  obtain ⟨k, hk, rfl⟩ := hp
  exact (hfactor k hk).1
have hsubset : primes ⊆ H.primeFactors := by
  intro p hp
  have hpPrime : p.Prime := hprime p hp
  dsimp [primes] at hp
  simp only [Finset.mem_image] at hp
  obtain ⟨k, hk, rfl⟩ := hp
  exact Nat.mem_primeFactors.mpr
    ⟨hpPrime, (hfactor k hk).2.2, ne_of_gt hH⟩
have hprodDvd : (∏ p ∈ primes, p) ∣ H := by
  exact (Finset.prod_dvd_prod_of_subset primes H.primeFactors
    (fun p => p) hsubset).trans (Nat.prod_primeFactors_dvd H)
calc
  2 ^ shifts.card = 2 ^ primes.card := by rw [hcard]
  _ = ∏ p ∈ primes, 2 := by simp
  _ ≤ ∏ p ∈ primes, p := by
    apply Finset.prod_le_prod'
    intro p hp
    exact (hprime p hp).two_le
  _ ≤ H := Nat.le_of_dvd hH hprodDvd

intro n shifts factor H hH hlt hfactor hlarge
have hinj : Set.InjOn factor (shifts : Set ℕ) := by
  intro k₁ hk₁ k₂ hk₂ heq
  simp only [Finset.mem_coe] at hk₁ hk₂
  by_contra hkne
  rcases lt_or_gt_of_ne hkne with hk₁k₂ | hk₂k₁
  · have hk₂n : k₂ < n := hlt k₂ hk₂
    have hd₁ : factor k₁ ∣ n - k₁ := (hfactor k₁ hk₁).2.1
    have hd₂ : factor k₁ ∣ n - k₂ := by
      simpa [heq] using (hfactor k₂ hk₂).2.1
    have hgap : factor k₁ ∣ k₂ - k₁ := by
      have h := Nat.dvd_sub hd₁ hd₂
      have hgap_eq : (n - k₁) - (n - k₂) = k₂ - k₁ := by omega
      rwa [hgap_eq] at h
    have hgap_pos : 0 < k₂ - k₁ := by omega
    have hle := Nat.le_of_dvd hgap_pos hgap
    exact (not_lt_of_ge hle) (hlarge k₁ hk₁ k₂ hk₂ hk₁k₂)
  · have hk₁n : k₁ < n := hlt k₁ hk₁
    have hd₁ : factor k₂ ∣ n - k₂ := (hfactor k₂ hk₂).2.1
    have hd₂ : factor k₂ ∣ n - k₁ := by
      simpa [heq] using (hfactor k₁ hk₁).2.1
    have hgap : factor k₂ ∣ k₁ - k₂ := by
      have h := Nat.dvd_sub hd₁ hd₂
      have hgap_eq : (n - k₂) - (n - k₁) = k₁ - k₂ := by omega
      rwa [hgap_eq] at h
    have hgap_pos : 0 < k₁ - k₂ := by omega
    have hle := Nat.le_of_dvd hgap_pos hgap
    exact (not_lt_of_ge hle) (hlarge k₂ hk₂ k₁ hk₁ hk₂k₁)
let primes := shifts.image factor
have hcard : primes.card = shifts.card := by
  dsimp [primes]
  exact Finset.card_image_iff.mpr hinj
have hprime : ∀ p ∈ primes, p.Prime := by
  intro p hp
  dsimp [primes] at hp
  simp only [Finset.mem_image] at hp
  obtain ⟨k, hk, rfl⟩ := hp
  exact (hfactor k hk).1
have hsubset : primes ⊆ H.primeFactors := by
  intro p hp
  have hpPrime : p.Prime := hprime p hp
  dsimp [primes] at hp
  simp only [Finset.mem_image] at hp
  obtain ⟨k, hk, rfl⟩ := hp
  exact Nat.mem_primeFactors.mpr
    ⟨hpPrime, (hfactor k hk).2.2, ne_of_gt hH⟩
have hprodDvd : (∏ p ∈ primes, p) ∣ H := by
  exact (Finset.prod_dvd_prod_of_subset primes H.primeFactors
    (fun p => p) hsubset).trans (Nat.prod_primeFactors_dvd H)
calc
  2 ^ shifts.card = 2 ^ primes.card := by rw [hcard]
  _ = ∏ p ∈ primes, 2 := by simp
  _ ≤ ∏ p ∈ primes, p := by
    apply Finset.prod_le_prod'
    intro p hp
    exact (hprime p hp).two_le
  _ ≤ H := Nat.le_of_dvd hH hprodDvd

info.lean_statement:
∀ (n : ℕ) (shifts : Finset ℕ) (factor : ℕ → ℕ) (H : ℕ),
  0 < H →
  (∀ k ∈ shifts, k < n) →
  (∀ k ∈ shifts,
    (factor k).Prime ∧ factor k ∣ n - k ∧ factor k ∣ H) →
  (∀ k₁ ∈ shifts, ∀ k₂ ∈ shifts,
    k₁ < k₂ → k₂ - k₁ < factor k₁) →
  2 ^ shifts.card ≤ H

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
